title: Mark Lee (rugby league)
wikitext:
{{short description|Wales international rugby league footballer and coach}} {{other people||Mark Lee (disambiguation){{!}}Mark Lee}} {{Use dmy dates|date=August 2014}} {{Use British English|date=August 2014}} {{Infobox rugby league biography |name = Mark Lee |fullname = Mark Lee |image = |imagesize = |caption = |birth_date = {{birth date and age|1968|03|27|df=y}} |death_date = |height = |weight = |position = {{rlp|SH|HK|SR}} |club1 = [[St Helens R.F.C.|St Helens]] |year1start = 1987 |year1end = 90 |appearances1 = 7 |tries1 = 0 |goals1 = 0 |fieldgoals1 = 1 |points1 = 1 |club2 = {{nowrap|[[Salford Red Devils|Salford City Reds]]}} |year2start = 1990 |year2end = 00 |appearances2 = 203 |tries2 = 23 |goals2 = 0 |fieldgoals2 = 22 |points2 = 114 | coachteam1 = [[Chorley Lynx]] | coachyear1start = 2003 | coachyear1end = 04 | coachgames1 = | coachwins1 = | coachdraws1 = | coachlosses1 = | coachteam2 = [[Blackpool Panthers]] | coachyear2start = 2004 | coachyear2end = 05 | coachgames2 = | coachwins2 = | coachdraws2 = | coachlosses2 = |retired = yes |source = {{cite web|url=http://www.rugbyleagueproject.org/players/mark-lee/summary.html|title=Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org|publisher=rugbyleagueproject.org|date=31 December 2011|accessdate=1 January 2012}}{{cite web|url=http://www.rugbyleagueproject.org/coaches/mark-lee/summary.html|title=Coach Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org|publisher=rugbyleagueproject.org|date=31 December 2011|accessdate=1 January 2012}}{{Rugby league records |id=5181 |title=Mark Lee |access-date=6 January 2024}} }} '''Mark Lee''' (born 27 March 1968) is a former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played in the 1980s, 1990s and 2000s. He played at club level for [[Blackbrook A.R.L.F.C.|Blackbrook ARLFC]] (in [[St Helens, Merseyside]]), [[St Helens R.F.C.|St. Helens]] and [[Salford Red Devils|Salford City Reds]] as a {{rlp|sh|hk}}, or {{rlp|sr}},{{cite book|first1= Graham|last1= Williams|first2= Peter|last2= Lush|first3= David|last3= Farrar|title= The British Rugby League Records Book|publisher= London League|isbn= 978-1-903659-49-6|year= 2009|pages= 108–114}} and coached at club level for [[Blackpool Panthers]] and [[Blackbrook A.R.L.F.C.|Blackbrook ARLFC]]. ==Playing career== ===Salford=== Lee signed for [[Salford Red Devils|Salford]] in January 1990.{{cite news |title=Crooks joins Castleford |work=The Guardian |date=9 January 1990 |location=London |page=15 |id={{ProQuest|187099889}}}} He played {{rlp|hk}} in [[Salford Red Devils|Salford]]'s 24–18 defeat by [[Widnes Vikings|Widnes]] in the [[1990 Lancashire Cup]] Final during the [[1990–91 Rugby Football League season|1990–91 season]] at [[Central Park (Wigan)|Central Park]], [[Wigan]] on Saturday 29 September 1990. ==Coaching career== In 2003, Lee was appointed as head coach of [[Chorley Lynx]].{{cite web |title=Lee ready to make his mark |url=https://www.theboltonnews.co.uk/news/5871236.lee-ready-to-make-his-mark/ |website=Bolton News |access-date=19 July 2025 |date=14 November 2003}} Following the demise of the club at the end of the 2004 season, Lee joined the newly-formed [[Blackpool Panthers]] along with many of the former Chorley players.{{cite web |last1=Kilgallon |first1=Steve |title=Panthers claw back a home in Blackpool |url=https://www.theguardian.com/sport/2004/dec/07/rugbyleague |website=The Guardian |access-date=19 July 2025 |date=7 December 2004}} ==References== {{reflist}} {{S-start}} {{S-sport}} {{succession box | before = ''Club founded'' | after = [[Kevin Ashcroft]]
2005 | title = Coach
